title: Vibrate
description: This show takes the audience on a journey from early archeologists' discoveries, to Victorian toys and advertising, through to the modern toys of today - a show which explores how adult toys have been presented through history, and how attitudes have widely changed and shifted from a focus on female 'hysteria,' to an emphasis on wellbeing and self-care.' All presented through story and original songs.

venue.name: Komedia Studio
venue.address: 44-47 Gardner Street, 44-46 Gardner Street, East Sussex
